case_title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. VS. MICHELLE THOMAS

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOMAS, MICHELLE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1139 MARKET STREET, ROOM #119, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, LEASE FORFEITED, ***THE RENTAL AGREEMENT IS CANCELED***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. SERVED JAN-30-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT THOMAS, MICHELLE
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT THOMAS, MICHELLE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT THOMAS, MICHELLE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT THOMAS, MICHELLE
